name: A Creative Director's Multimedia Skills and Experience in Video Production

chat_messages.text:
create an additional skills section going off of the format from resume to accommodate for these skills: CAA's Media & Entertainment Partnerships group provides powerful solutions for brands with world-class media and entertainment companies, talent & IP.Representing today's most influential entertainment studios, platforms, streamers and brands, we forge strategic partnerships and content marketing solutions with leading global advertisers. Some of these clients include Apple TV+, Lionsgate, HBO, Paramount, Merlin Entertainments and Vox. The team also specializes in connecting brands with consumers through pop culture moments and entertainment-based marketing strategies. With expertise across multiple disciplines, we have the talent, knowledge and relationships necessary to generate the biggest ideas and most compelling partnerships to ensure our clients stand out.THE ROLEThe team is seeking a full-time Designer who is highly-motivated, creative, and entrepreneurial to join our rapidly growing team.RESPONSIBILITIES:

*   Support the team through developing the visual materials, mockups and presentations that bring big ideas to life, creating compelling storytelling vehicles for communicating strategic and creative concepts (primarily using Keynote and Photoshop).
    
*   Perform brand research to gain an understanding of what will resonate best with each project's unique audience, and own the vision and execution for how to best translate ideas into slides.
    
*   Manage scope timelines and deliverable schedule for assigned clients.
    
*   Set internal check-ins as needed to track towards client deadlines and projects.
    
*   Keep internal creative team and stakeholders up to date on project status and delivery tracking.
    

*   Join client and brand calls to receive and implement feedback, presenting creative work when applicable.
    
*   Participate in group brainstorms to develop creative angles for brand conversations.
    

*   Develop, update and revamp various department capabilities presentations as needed.
    
*   Attend department meetings to apply shared knowledge to future creative work, anticipate group needs, and offer up available creative resources.
    

QUALIFICATIONS:

*   3+ years' experience in entertainment, brand marketing and / or agencies in a design or creative role. Graphic Design degree and portfolio preferred.
    
*   Experience with creating presentations in Keynote required.
    
*   Ability to engage & communicate effectively with senior level decision-makers.
    
*   Professional level design skills to create and/or update presentation materials as needed with the Adobe suite of products.
    
*   Stellar interpersonal, analytical and organizational skills.
    
*   Desire to bring new thinking and your unique perspective to each project.
    
*   Flexible and enthusiastic to work within a fast-moving and ever-changing organization.
    
*   Highly detailed with some knowledge of marketing and entertainment trends, emerging media, consumer insights and the latest digital/social/mobile/video/interactive technologies and activations.
    
*   Highly organized, strategically minded, extremely resourceful and an exceptional communicator (both verbal and written).
    
*   Highly creative and passionate about great design, with an "eye" for visual communication and print/digital layouts.Impeccable attention to detail and ability to follow established workflow.
    
*   Significant After Effects experience.
    
*   Deep understanding of broadcast video formats, file types, codecs, frame rates, field order etc.
    
*   Familiar with Photoshop and Illustrator.
    
*   Strong IT skills.
    
*   Ability to work quick, independently and self manage multiple deadlines.

attachments.extracted_content:
ZAYNE AMASON
(334) 734-6963 | zbamason@gmail.com
OBJECTIVE
Visionary creative leader offering 3+ years directing video production teams and coordinating
artistic projects, fused with game design and digital media skills to deliver memorable
interactive narratives and impactful visual storytelling.
SUMMARY
● 
Over 8 years combined experience as creative director and in game, film, and digital
content creation roles
● 
Deep expertise conceiving compelling character-driven narratives and expansive world
building
● 
Excels directing cross-functional teams, writers, and artists to establish and execute on
creative vision
● 
Passionate about developing memorable gaming moments through immersive stories
● 
Unwavering advocate for diversity, equity and inclusion guiding all creative efforts
SKILLS
Software: Mac and Windows OS, Pro tools, Logic pro, audacity, Premiere Pro, Photoshop,
Illustrator, Lightroom Classic, After Effects, Audacity, Microsoft Office, Google Suite, Aspera,
Monday.com, Unreal Engine 4, Unity, Jira, Confluence, Slack, Excel, Outlook, Frame.io
Technical Skills: Web Design, Graphic Design, Film Production, Technical Documentation,
Scrum Methodologies
Creative skills: IP Development, Narrative Design, World Building, Directing, Writing, Character
Creation, Art Direction
Interpersonal Skills: Customer Service, Project Management, Event Planning and Logistics,
Producing and Creative Direction, Cross-Department Collaboration, Client Relationships,
resource coordination
RELEVANT EXPERIENCE
Wayward Music, Hermosa, CA — Creative Director, May 2021 – August 2022
● 
Held weekly meetings to collaborate with artists on content production
● 
Coordinated schedules, travel, expenses and shipping/receiving, facilitated/coordinated
studio sessions and release events.
● 
Created graphics, music videos, and other digital media for talent
● 
Talent Scouting, outreach, worked in A&R capacity carrying out artist research and
discovery
Transplant Connect, Santa Monica, CA — Quality Assurance Analyst, 2019 – 2021
● 
Communicated daily with engineers, marketing, and QA to ensure specifications were
met
● 
Managed multiple projects utilizing Jira, Slack, Outlook, and Excel
● 
Identified issues and prioritized tasks across releases
Army National Guard, Auburn, AL — Combat Medic, 2010 – 2018

● 
Coordinated emergency response evacuations under challenging conditions
● 
Established and maintained training safety protocols
EDUCATION
Full Sail University, Winter Park, FL
Bachelor of Science: Game Design, June 2019
Relevant Coursework: Design Thinking, 3D Modeling, Level Design, C# Programming
Projects:
Mad Scientists and Dinosaurs, Full Sail University, June 2017
● 
Designed and prototyped strategy board game within tight deadline
● 
Organized iterative playtests to refine gameplay and layout
Steve Savage Jr vs Aliens, Full Sail University, Jan – June 2019
● 
Balanced gameplay systems through testing and feedback integration
● Exercised Critical thinking skills in the Design and C# scripting
● implemented: 3 main game-play systems, 4 player abilities, and numerous UI features
● 
Developed rich worldbuilding, multi-season story arcs and key narrative pillars
● 
Led regular team playtests to gather feedback and refine approach
VIDEO PRODUCTION CREDITS
(Short Film) The Experience (2023)
Writer, Producer, Director, DP, Editor, Set Designer
(Short Film) Trigga Troy (2023)
Writer, Producer, Director, DP, Editor, Set Designer
(Feature Film) Hip Hop Movie (Shot 2023/ Unreleased)
Set PA, Camera PA

Producer, BTS, Production Assistant

Production Assistant, BTS

Production Assistant, BTS

chat_messages.text:
Here is an additional skills section to add to the resume based on the provided job description:

Additional Skills

Presentation Design: Proficient in developing visually compelling presentations in Keynote; ability to effectively translate strategic and creative concepts into impactful storytelling slides 

Brand Research: Experience performing brand research to determine effective creative angles tailored to target audiences

Project Management: Skilled at managing project scope, timelines and deliverables; ability to set internal check-ins to ensure deadlines are met

Stakeholder Relations: Talent for joining client and brand calls to receive feedback, present creative work, and implement revisions accordingly  

Creative Development: Participates in collaborative group brainstorms to formulate innovative branding and marketing campaign strategies

Adobe Creative Suite: Professional-level design skills utilizing Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects and other Adobe programs
 
Video Production: Deep understanding of broadcast video formats, codecs, frame rates and technical specifications; significant After Effects experience

Time Management: Demonstrated ability to work quickly under tight deadlines, multi-task and self-manage conflicting priorities

Interpersonal Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communicator with senior-level decision makers; flexible team player
